prompt: Add a privacy policy section/page to the news-website repo that explains all data collection (comments, analytics tags, cookies, ad identifiers, newsletters, contact forms), lists third-party services (Google Analytics, Google AdSense or other ad partners, affiliate networks), describes user data rights (access, correction, deletion, portability, objection, breach notices, withdrawing consent), provides a clear contact point for privacy questions, and tells visitors how to opt out of tracking or marketing communications. Call out that the site is preparing to monetize via ads/partners but that no sensitive data is sold. Make the policy easy to read, link it in the footer, and update navigation if needed so the policy is discoverable.
title: Add privacy policy for monetization
